plugin.name: Passwordless Sign-in (Magic Link)
plugin.summary: Let users sign in with a one-time email link — no password required.
plugin.description:
Adds passwordless sign-in to OJS using one-time email links, alongside the standard username/password flow. Users enter their email, receive a secure link, and sign in with one click.

Features include per-IP rate limiting, a selector/verifier token scheme (only a SHA-256 hash is stored), single-use tokens, CSRF protection, and full email template customisation from Settings › Emails.

release.description: Automatic theme-agnostic injection of the sign-in-link button into the login form (no theme edits required); single-column default plugin pages. Includes one-time email link sign-in with rate limiting, CSRF protection, and email template support.
